recommendations.rationale: Tencent is in a downtrend and near the bottom of its 60-day range, but the one-day decline was milder than other internet-platform peers and volume was light, so wait for stabilization rather than chase weakness.
evidence: Market summary risk_state is risk_off
0700.HK closed at 489.2, below ma20 518.64 and ma60 555.155
60-day range position is 0.0502, near the lower end
Volume ratio to 20-day average is 0.5732, suggesting the decline was not on heavy volume
risks: Downtrend can continue while price remains below both moving averages
Internet-platform theme is weak with Alibaba making a 60-day low
Broad Hong Kong market is also flagged downtrend
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the 20-day moving average with improving market risk state; avoid if it breaks materially below the latest low of 485.0 on rising volume.
